---
name: Feature / Lane Request
about: A new capability, lane extension, or profile variant
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<p>
  <img src="../assets/readme/zpe-masthead.gif" alt="ZPE-IMC Masthead" width="100%">
</p>

<p>
  <img src="../assets/readme/section-bars/feature-request.svg" alt="FEATURE REQUEST" width="100%">
</p>


**What are you proposing?**
A clear description of the capability, lane, or profile variant
you are proposing.

**Which category best describes this?**

- [ ] New modality or lane
- [ ] New Primitive Profile (N-variant)
- [ ] Extension to an existing lane
- [ ] CLI or tooling improvement
- [ ] CI/CD or workflow improvement
- [ ] Other (describe):

**Open frontier alignment (optional but recommended)**

- [ ] Tokenizer deployment posture (`INCONCLUSIVE_FOR_DEPLOYMENT`) is relevant to this request
- [ ] IoT augmented baseline unresolved claim (`7` pass / `1` fail) is relevant
- [ ] Bio external baseline stretch target remains OPEN and is relevant
- [ ] GPU fleet readiness gate (`NO` for Ink/Prosody/XR/Bio Wearable) is relevant
- [ ] None of the current open frontiers apply

**N-variant context (if this is a profile request)**

- Primitive count / profile target:
- Does this alter marker families or word-envelope assumptions:
- Compatibility-vector impact expectation:

**Why does this belong in ZPE-IMC?**
Explain how this fits within the wave1.0 integration contract
or what contract change it would require. Proposals that require
a compatibility vector change must identify the coordination
impact on ZPE-Bio and ZPE-IoT.

**Evidence or prior art**
Is there a baseline comparator, an external dataset, or a
falsification protocol you would use to gate this? Proposals
without a gating strategy are unlikely to be accepted.

**Scope discipline check**
Confirm that this proposal does not inflate claims beyond codec
integrity (e.g. no human-equivalence, clinical efficacy, or
regulatory fitness claims):

- [ ] Confirmed — this is a codec integrity proposal
